scope_note: QA Witt Tower Ramified Prime Closed Form cert [434]. Completes the prime-class trichotomy left open by every cert in this chain -- [389], [421], [424], [429], [431], [432], [433] all restrict their closed forms to p != 5, excluding the ramified prime (the only p where x^2-x-1 has a double root mod p rather than two distinct roots or none). Primary sources: Serre, J.-P. (1979) 'Local Fields' doi:10.1007/978-1-4757-5673-9 (ramification theory); Wall, D.D. (1960) 'Fibonacci series modulo m' American Mathematical Monthly 67(6) doi:10.2307/2309169 (Pisano period table, pi(5)=20); Ireland, K. and Rosen, M. (1990) 'A Classical Introduction to Modern Number Theory' ISBN 978-0-387-97329-6 Ch.7 (primitive roots, Hensel lifting). CLAIM (narrow and falsifiable): for sigma_m(a,b)=(a+b mod m, a mod m), driven by M=[[1,1],[1,0]] with char poly x^2-x-1: mod 5, x^2-x-1=(x-3)^2 has a DOUBLE root at primitive root 3, so M mod 5 = 3*I + N is a genuine non-diagonalizable Jordan block (N != 0 mod 5, N^2 = 0 mod 5, verified directly). (C1) PERIOD_SET_LAW_RAMIFIED: the period set of sigma on (Z/5^k Z)^2 is exactly {1,4} union {4*5^L : L=1..k} for every k -- verified by brute-force orbit decomposition k=1..5 in self-test, plus k=6 gathered during development (cited here, not re-run automatically for runtime: 45.6s). (C2) BIRTH_JUMP_FREEZE_MULTIPLICITY: for period P_L=4*5^L, orbit count as function of level k is 0 (k<L), 5^(L-1) (k==L, birth), 6*5^(L-1) (k>L, one delayed jump then frozen forever) -- a strictly different recursion than the split/inert case in [433] C1, where a new period's count freezes IMMEDIATELY with no jump. Verified k=2..5. (C3) EIGENLINE_PERSISTENCE: periods 1 (fixed point) and 4 (kernel of N, the one direction that Hensel-lifts exactly) each have orbit count exactly 1 at every level k=1..5, with no birth/jump -- a direct instance of [432]'s embedding-isomorphism mechanism (proved there unconditionally regardless of prime class), confirming p=5 is NOT an exception to THAT part of the chain; only the new-part multiplicity law (C2) is genuinely novel. (C4) JORDAN_BLOCK_NONDEGENERACY: fast modular arithmetic (no brute force) confirms N=M-3I mod5 is nonzero with N^2=0 mod5 (genuine non-split Jordan block), and ord(3 mod 5^k)=4*5^(k-1) for k=1..30 (3 is a primitive root mod every power of 5, no Wieferich-like stalling) -- the algebraic facts C1-C2 rest on. DERIVATION: in the eigenbasis-free Jordan-block setting, M^n = 3^n*I + n*3^(n-1)*N (since N^2=0); requiring M^n=I forces 3^n=1 mod 5^k (giving the ord(3) factor) AND n*3^(n-1)*N=0 mod 5^k (forcing an EXTRA factor of 5 beyond ord(3 mod 5^k), since N is a unit-scaled nonzero nilpotent at every level) -- this is exactly why period(level k) = 5 * ord(3 mod 5^k) = ord(3 mod 5^(k+1)), one tower level ahead of the pure scalar order, and why new orbits at level k+1 split into two strata sharing periods 4*5^k (old value, second contribution) and 4*5^(k+1) (brand new), rather than producing one brand-new period per level as in the split/inert case. RELATION TO [432]/[433]: not a duplicate -- both explicitly restrict p != 5 and never derive this closed form; [432] only spot-checks (via fixture) that its embedding mechanism's commuting square still holds for p=5, without deriving the multiplicity law. THEOREM NT: all matrix/order arithmetic is pure integer mod 5^k throughout; no float, no observer layer. 4 checks PASS; self-test ok (5.1s). Derived 2026-06-16.
